name: The Ghostly Toll
description: As you prepare to cross a narrow stone bridge, a pale, translucent figure in rusted plate armor shimmer into existence, blocking your path with a spectral polearm.

toll-initial.text: 'None pass without paying the toll of memory,' the spirit rasps. 'Speak a truth that weighs on your soul, or face the cold steel of the past.'

choices.label: [Paladin/Cleric] Offer a prayer for the spirit's rest.
[Bard] Recite a lament for fallen heroes.
[Resolve 15] Stare down the spirit with unshakable will.

holy-rest.text: Your words carry divine weight. The spirit's armor begins to glow with a soft light. 'Finally... silence,' it whispers, and fades into the mist.

bard-lament.text: The melody is hauntingly beautiful. The spirit bows its head, its translucent form shimmering with appreciation. It steps aside, pointing to a hidden pouch beneath a loose stone.

resolve-check.success_text: You meet the spirit's hollow gaze with your own. It recognizes a will stronger than its own and slowly fades away.
resolve-check.failure_text: The spirit's gaze pierces your mind. You are filled with a crushing sense of dread.

resolve-fail.text: You are forced to retreat as the spirit's polearm sweeps through your chest with a numbing chill.

pay-toll.text: The coins pass through the spirit's hand and vanish. It nods solemnly and disappears.

combat-ghost.text: Your blade passes through the mist! The spirit lets out a mournful howl and strikes back.

exit.text: You cross the bridge, the air feeling slightly warmer on the other side.
